stories.headline_en: 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 20

perspectives.headline: 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 20
perspectives.excerpt: 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 20 - Published Russian forces launched a major drone and missile attack on Kyiv overnight, killing 20 people, in what the city's mayor has described as the "most massive attack" on the Ukrainian capital. Vitaly Klitschko said around 90 people were injured.…

perspectives.headline: At least 20 dead as Russia launches massive drone and missile attack on Kyiv
perspectives.excerpt: At least 20 people have been killed and dozens injured overnight in Kyiv, local authorities have said as Russia launched its latest massive drone and missile attack on the Ukrainian capital. Fires were burning at sites across Kyiv as dawn broke on Thursday, with strikes or debris hitting residential buildings in several districts and a hotel on one of the central boulevards.…

perspectives.headline: Russia hits Ukraine's capital with a massive drone and missile attack, killing at least 18
perspectives.excerpt: Russia launched a large-scale attack on Ukraine's capital overnight into Thursday, with ballistic and cruise missiles and drones, killing several people.

stories.headline_en: Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession

perspectives.headline: Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession
perspectives.excerpt: Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession - Published Nine Buddhist monks were killed and several others in their procession injured when they were hit by an 11-year-old boy driving his parents' pickup truck in north-east Thailand, police said.…

perspectives.headline: At least nine monks killed in Thailand after boy drives truck into procession
perspectives.excerpt: An 11-year-old boy has driven his parents’ truck into a Buddhist procession in Thailand, killing at least nine monks. CCTV footage shared by a local rescue group showed the moment the monks, wearing orange robes, were run over as they walked in procession along a road. The timestamp on the footage was shortly before 11am local time on Thursday.…

perspectives.headline: Eight Thai monks killed after child drives truck into procession
perspectives.excerpt: Eight Thai monks killed after child drives truck into procession Police say 11-year-old boy who took his parents’ vehicle without permission is now in custody and will be questioned. Eight Thai monks have been killed and other people injured after a child drove his family’s pick-up truck into a Buddhist procession.…

stories.headline_en: Anthropic is bringing back Claude Fable 5 globally after US lifts export control order — where can enterprises access it?

perspectives.headline: Anthropic is bringing back Claude Fable 5 globally after US lifts export control order — where can enterprises access it?
perspectives.excerpt: Anthropic is restoring global access to its most powerful generally released AI model yet, Claude Fable 5, today, after the U.S. Department of Commerce last night withdrew the emergency export controls it had issued previously around the model. The U.S.…

perspectives.headline: How Anthropic Made Its Powerful Fable 5 Model Safe to Deploy Again, Ending a Global Shutdown
perspectives.excerpt: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 was blocked shortly after its release because of a ‘national security concern.’

perspectives.headline: Anthropic's Fable 5 is back after the Trump administration lifted export controls
perspectives.excerpt: Anthropic's Fable 5 model came back online for users on Wednesday, after the Trump administration lifted an export control late Tuesday. Why it matters: It's the most powerful publicly available AI tool — so capable that the U.S. government decided Anthropic had to add further safety measures in order to make it broadly available.…

stories.headline_en: From friendship bracelets to wedding rings: A Taylor and Travis timeline

perspectives.headline: From friendship bracelets to wedding rings: A Taylor and Travis timeline
perspectives.excerpt: From friendship bracelets to wedding rings: A Taylor and Travis timeline - Published It looks official: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are expected to celebrate their wedding with a party at New York's Madison Square Garden this weekend. Speculation about the ceremony has been rife ever since the couple announced their engagement in an Instagram post last August.…

perspectives.headline: How Much Is an Invite to Taylor Swift’s Wedding Worth? 8 Percent of This Group Says They Would Spend Over $10,000
perspectives.excerpt: The pop star and Travis Kelce are allegedly tying the knot this weekend. Fans of the duo are eager for an opportunity to witness the event.

perspectives.headline: Taylor Swift spent two decades selling a fairy tale. Her wedding is the payoff.
perspectives.excerpt: As the Fourth of July weekend approaches, America's 250th birthday is being overshadowed by another major world event: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding.…

stories.headline_en: OpenAI Proposes Giving the US Government a 5% Stake, FT Says

perspectives.headline: OpenAI Proposes Giving the US Government a 5% Stake, FT Says
perspectives.excerpt: OpenAI has begun preliminary discussions about giving the US government a 5% stake in the ChatGPT-developer, the Financial Times reported, citing two people familiar with the talks.

perspectives.headline: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
perspectives.excerpt: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom A government stake could help the company avoid onerous regulation.…

stories.headline_en: Vatican excommunicates all members of ultra-conservative rebel group SSPX

perspectives.headline: Vatican excommunicates all members of ultra-conservative rebel group SSPX
perspectives.excerpt: The Vatican has excommunicated a rebel group of ultra-conservative Catholics who defied Pope Leo by ordaining bishops without his consent, creating a schism in the Roman Catholic church.…

perspectives.headline: Trump denies conflict of interest over crypto. And, Vatican excommunicates rebel group
perspectives.excerpt: Trump and his family earned over $1 billion last year through cryptocurrency ventures and other businesses. And, the Vatican declared that the traditionalist Society of St. Pius X has entered schism.

stories.headline_en: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign

perspectives.headline: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
perspectives.excerpt: Apple is working on a “revamped” version of its entry-level MacBook Pro that it could launch as soon as the first half of 2027, Bloomberg reports. The company is also testing four new iPad Pros that are set to launch in the spring with a focus on “internal improvements.” Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign The company is also reportedly updating the iPad Pro next year.…

perspectives.headline: Apple is reportedly planning new iPad Pro and MacBook Pro releases early next year
perspectives.excerpt: Apple reportedly has plans to release several new iPad Pros and a new MacBook Pro in the first half of next year. The company is currently working on four models of the new tablet with faster chips, Bloomberg reported. It is also developing a new “entry-level” MacBook Pro, which is internally referred to as K104, the outlet writes.…

stories.headline_en: Kroger to buy regional grocer Giant Eagle in $1.65 billion deal

perspectives.headline: Kroger to buy regional grocer Giant Eagle in $1.65 billion deal
perspectives.excerpt: Kroger said Wednesday it plans to buy regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion. Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 stand-alone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland, and Indiana. They would continue to operate under the Giant Eagle name under the terms of the deal.…

perspectives.headline: Kroger Just Struck a $1.65 Billion Deal to Buy a Family-Owned Grocery Chain. Experts Are Already Sounding the Alarm
perspectives.excerpt: The acquisition will hand Kroger control of nearly 200 Giant Eagle supermarkets across the Midwest.

stories.headline_en: Sony announces end of PlayStation discs, parts of digital store in the same day

perspectives.headline: Sony announces end of PlayStation discs, parts of digital store in the same day
perspectives.excerpt: Some gamers are concerned about the future of game ownership after Sony’s announcement today that it won’t produce physical discs for PlayStation games as of January 2028. On that date, “new games will be available on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only,” Sony said in a blog post.…

perspectives.headline: Sony to end physical PlayStation game disc production in 2028
perspectives.excerpt: Sony announced Wednesday that it will stop producing physical discs for all new PlayStation games starting in January 2028, marking a move into an all-digital future. After that, every new release will be sold digitally through the PlayStation Store and other retailers. Games released before the cutoff will continue to be available on disc.…

stories.headline_en: Tesla delivered 480,000 vehicles last quarter, blowing past Wall Street's expectations

perspectives.headline: Tesla delivered 480,000 vehicles last quarter, blowing past Wall Street's expectations
perspectives.excerpt: Analysts had expected roughly 406,000 deliveries; Tesla also produced 451,758 vehicles in the quarter

perspectives.headline: Tesla saw a massive sales jump in the second quarter
perspectives.excerpt: Tesla delivered more than 480,000 vehicles in the second quarter of this year, an increase of more than 120,000 from the first quarter, in a sign that the company is still able to attract new buyers for its EVs despite a downturn in the U.S. market. The company said Thursday that it built 451,758 in the second quarter, 442,936 of which were Model 3 sedans and Model Y SUVs.…

stories.headline_en: China’s ethnic unity law denounced as ‘forced assimilation’ by rights groups

perspectives.headline: China’s ethnic unity law denounced as ‘forced assimilation’ by rights groups
perspectives.excerpt: A new ethnic unity law has come into effect in China despite warnings from Taiwan, the United Nations and rights groups that it could threaten freedoms, especially for minorities. The Law on Promoting Ethnic Unity and Progress aims to forge a “shared” national identity among ethnic groups, for example by strengthening the status of Mandarin as the official language.…

perspectives.headline: What’s China’s new ethnic unity law, and what does it mean for minorities?
perspectives.excerpt: What’s China’s new ethnic unity law, and what does it mean for minorities? Critics say it could hasten the forced assimilation of minorities and lead to the targeting of critics outside China. Beijing, however, rejects these accusations.…

stories.headline_en: US blocks long-term renewal of North American trade deal

perspectives.headline: US blocks long-term renewal of North American trade deal
perspectives.excerpt: US blocks long-term renewal of North American trade deal - Published The US has declined to renew the landmark US-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) in its current form, according to a senior US official. This decision means the trilateral trade pact will miss out on an automatic 16-year extension.…

perspectives.headline: Trump refuses to renew US-Canada-Mexico trade pact he once championed
perspectives.excerpt: Donald Trump has refused to renew the North American trade pact he once championed as his signature deal, opting instead to keep it alive on a short leash of annual reviews rather than committing to another 16 years. Wednesday was the deadline built into the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) for the three countries to jointly decide its fate, which is set to expire in 2036.…

stories.headline_en: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest

perspectives.headline: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
perspectives.excerpt: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.

perspectives.headline: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
perspectives.excerpt: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.

stories.headline_en: Anthropic Added a New Security Measure to Get Back Into the Trump Administration’s Good Graces

perspectives.headline: Anthropic Added a New Security Measure to Get Back Into the Trump Administration’s Good Graces
perspectives.excerpt: The Trump administration lifted export controls on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 AI model after the company agreed to extend an existing guardrail to prevent users from trying to access certain restricted capabilities, according to two people familiar with the matter.…

perspectives.headline: After spooking Trump into safety testing, Anthropic AI models get global release
perspectives.excerpt: The US has lifted export curbs on Anthropic’s newest Claude models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, about three weeks after the Trump administration flagged the models as national security risks. As of today, Anthropic confirmed in a blog post, Fable 5 will be available globally, and US organizations have had access restored to Mythos 5 since June 26.…

stories.headline_en: Alibaba to pay $600m to settle illegal drug sales allegations in US probe

perspectives.headline: Alibaba to pay $600m to settle illegal drug sales allegations in US probe
perspectives.excerpt: Alibaba to pay $600m to settle illegal drug sales allegations in US probe E-commerce giant admitted it failed to prevent about 80,000 illegal drug product sales, according to US Justice Department.…

perspectives.headline: Alibaba agrees to pay $600 million to settle DOJ probe into illegal drug sales
perspectives.excerpt: The Chinese e-commerce company and its U.S.-based payment processor admitted to roughly 80,000 unlawful product sales over nearly a decade

stories.headline_en: Four die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations

perspectives.headline: Four die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
perspectives.excerpt: Four die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations - Published A 19-year-old woman is among three people to have died from suffocation during World Cup celebrations in Mexico City on Tuesday. A 48-year-old woman and a 44-year-old man also died after crowds descended on the city following the country's 2-0 victory over Ecuador, the capital's health authority said on Wednesday.…

perspectives.headline: Four people die in mass fan celebrations in Mexico City after World Cup victory
perspectives.excerpt: Four people died, three from suffocation, as thousands of fans crowded Mexico City streets during World Cup celebrations, the capital’s health secretariat said in the early hours of Wednesday. The deaths occurred near the Angel of Independence landmark, where thousands of fans had gathered to celebrate Mexico’s 2-0 victory over Ecuador in the last 32.…

stories.headline_en: Can Bending Spoons thrive as a listed company?

perspectives.headline: Can Bending Spoons thrive as a listed company?
perspectives.excerpt: A rare Italian software star uses the private-equity playbook

perspectives.headline: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck
perspectives.excerpt: AOL is public again — sort of. Its owner Bending Spoons, the 13-year-old Italian company that has been quietly acquiring beloved but ailing internet brands for the past decade, went public on the Nasdaq today, opening at an over $18 billion valuation, with the stock then popping 40% by market close.…

stories.headline_en: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish

perspectives.headline: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
perspectives.excerpt: Elon Musk’s SpaceX has shown investors a prototype of a “handset-like” AI device, reports The Wall Street Journal. The prototype is reportedly sleeker and slimmer than an iPhone, making us wonder if it’s something between a small touchscreen phone and a Rabbit R1.…

perspectives.headline: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype
perspectives.excerpt: Elon Musk says a report about a SpaceX AI phone prototype is “utterly false.” The report, published on Wednesday by The Wall Street Journal, says SpaceX showed off a “handset-like prototype” to some investors before launching its record-breaking initial public offering in June.…
